data.body: 625b CI Verified-1: docs/env-vars.md stale (outbound_differ.py line shifts 86->79, 111->104). FIX: python scripts/gen_env_registry.py; amended into 625b (Change-Id preserved), re-pushed 931 ps2. NOTE: run gen_env_registry.py in preflight for eefd/ad44 too. Also recovered from an accidental 'git stash pop' of the operator's shared stash (git stash push -- <untracked> stashed nothing) -> reset AGENTS.md to HEAD + rm uv.lock; operator stash INTACT, no data lost. eefd remediated (scope+=outbound_differ; ADD dedup direction-agnostic on (vendor_type,remote_key)); review2 running.
